issues.description: [Your Turn] in effect text requires duration:"DuringYourTurn", not "EndOfTurn". Duration must be DuringYourTurn since the effect explicitly states 'during this turn' with [Your Turn] tag.
Target should specify character type restriction for [Rob Lucci] cards. Current scope "ChooseOwnCharacter" lacks the type filter. Should be target with type condition or filtered selection.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [On Play] Up to 1 of your [Rob Lucci] cards gains +2000 power during this turn.
